query: What is the company's refund policy?
context: Our refund policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Items must be in original packaging.
notes: Basic refund policy query, directly supported by context.

query: What are the office hours?
context: Our office is open Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM Eastern Time. We are closed on weekends and federal holidays.
notes: Simple factual query with clear context match.

query: How do I reset my password?
context: To reset your password, click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. You will receive an email with a reset link valid for 24 hours.
notes: Common support query with step-by-step context.

query: What payment methods do you accept?
context: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, and bank transfers. All transactions are encrypted with TLS 1.3.
notes: Payment methods query with comprehensive context.

query: What is the shipping time for domestic orders?
context: Domestic orders are shipped within 1-2 business days. Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping delivers in 2-3 business days.
notes: Shipping query with detailed context.

query: Can I cancel my subscription?
context: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the Account Settings page. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
notes: Subscription cancellation with clear policy context.

query: What programming languages does the API support?
context: Our API provides official SDKs for Python, JavaScript, Java, Go, and Ruby. Community-maintained libraries exist for Rust and C#.
notes: Technical query with specific enumerated answers in context.

query: What is the maximum file upload size?
context: The maximum file upload size is 100 MB for free tier users and 500 MB for premium users. Supported formats include PDF, DOCX, PNG, and JPG.
notes: File upload limits directly stated in context.

query: How do I contact customer support?
context: Customer support is available via email at support@example.com, live chat on our website, or phone at 1-800-555-0199 during business hours.
notes: Contact information query with multiple channels in context.

query: What are the system requirements for the desktop app?
context: The desktop app requires Windows 10 or later, macOS 12 or later, or Ubuntu 20.04+. Minimum 4 GB RAM and 500 MB disk space are required.
notes: System requirements with detailed specifications in context.

query: Is there a free trial available?
context: We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all premium features. No credit card is required to start the trial.
notes: Free trial inquiry with straightforward context.

query: How do I export my data?
context: You can export your data in CSV, JSON, or XML format from the Settings > Data Export page. Exports are generated within 24 hours and available for download for 7 days.
notes: Data export process clearly described in context.

query: What is the API rate limit?
context: The API rate limit is 1000 requests per minute for standard plans and 10000 requests per minute for enterprise plans. Rate limit headers are included in every response.
notes: Rate limit details with tier differentiation in context.

query: Does the platform support two-factor authentication?
context: Yes, we support two-factor authentication via SMS, authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy), and hardware security keys (FIDO2/WebAuthn).
notes: Security feature query with explicit confirmation in context.

query: What database engines are supported?
context: We support PostgreSQL 13+, MySQL 8.0+, SQLite 3.35+, and MongoDB 5.0+. Oracle and SQL Server support is available in the enterprise tier.
notes: Database compatibility query with version specifics.

query: How is data encrypted at rest?
context: All data at rest is encrypted using AES-256. Encryption keys are managed through AWS KMS with automatic key rotation every 90 days.
notes: Encryption details directly stated in context.

query: What is the uptime SLA?
context: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for all paid plans. If uptime falls below this threshold, customers receive service credits proportional to the downtime experienced.
notes: SLA details with compensation policy in context.

query: Can I use the service in the EU?
context: Yes, we have data centers in Frankfurt and Dublin. EU customers' data is stored and processed exclusively within the EU in compliance with GDPR.
notes: Regional availability with compliance details.

query: How many users can be on a team plan?
context: Team plans support 5 to 50 users. Each additional user beyond 50 can be added for $12/month. All team members share a unified dashboard.
notes: Team plan capacity with pricing context.

query: What is the data retention policy?
context: Customer data is retained for the duration of the active subscription plus 30 days after cancellation. After that, data is permanently deleted from all systems including backups.
notes: Data retention with clear timeline in context.

query: Does the mobile app work offline?
context: The mobile app supports offline mode for viewing previously synced documents and drafting new content. Changes sync automatically when connectivity is restored.

query: What compliance certifications do you hold?

query: How do webhooks work in your system?
context: Webhooks send HTTP POST requests to your specified URL when events occur. Supported events include user.created, order.completed, and payment.failed. Payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256.

query: What is the pricing for the enterprise plan?
